name: XSA6 + BigramHash4K + GatedAttn + ValueResidual on Hedge Mixer Stack
author: Shaik Ahamed Sahir
changes: Based on PR #720 (agalimova: XSA6 + BigramHash4K + HedgeMixer)
Gated Attention: added per-head FP32 scalar gate (attn_gate, init=1.0) to CausalSelfAttention
Value Residual: added per-block FP32 scalar (lambda_v, init=0.0) injecting initial embedding x0 into each Block output
Both attn_gate and lambda_v registered in CONTROL_TENSOR_NAME_PATTERNS (remains in FP32, not quantized by GPTQ)
Set default EVAL_STRIDE=64 to strictly guarantee sub-600s compliance
